name: sidebar: New File creates untitled, enters rename, and commits the new name
comment: PRECONDITION: `rm -rf /tmp/medit-fixture && mkdir -p /tmp/medit-fixture`. Verifies the full 1.5 flow: New File creates 'untitled' inside the clicked folder, enters an inline rename field (pre-focused with its text selected), and the rename COMMITS to the new name. The rename field is a plain NSTextField that the app has already focused, so we type with `focus: false` (skip AutoPilot's focus-click, which would drop the field editor) and `commit: true` (press Return to fire end-editing). Asserts the new row appears and 'untitled' is gone.
